verdict: High AI displacement risk. Physicist scores 96 / 100 on AI displacement exposure over a 5-year horizon.

reasoning_steps.title: Routine Cognitive Tasks
reasoning_steps.body: Tasks 1, 2, and 4 from the O*NET task list involve complex calculations, data analysis, and computer simulations, all of which are routine cognitive tasks that can be handled by current LLMs.

reasoning_steps.title: AI Capability Gap
reasoning_steps.body: Task 9 involves developing theories and laws on the basis of observation and experiments, but current LLMs can already apply these theories to problems in areas such as nuclear energy, optics, and aerospace technology.

adjacent_careers.name: Research Scientist
adjacent_careers.reasoning: Both physicists and research scientists work in a wide range of research fields, spanning all length scales.

adjacent_careers.name: Biologist
adjacent_careers.reasoning: Physicists often work in biological physics, which involves the study of living organisms and their interactions with the physical world.

recent_developments.headline: New AI Model Passes Physics Problem-Solving Test
recent_developments.impact: The new model's performance on physics problem-solving tasks is comparable to that of human physicists.

recent_developments.headline: AlphaFold reshapes structural biology research
recent_developments.impact: Predicted protein structures are now a default starting point for experimental design.

quotes.quote: AlphaFold has predicted the structure of nearly every known protein. Tasks that took a PhD student years now take seconds. The bottleneck has moved to the experiments and the questions.
quotes.speaker: Demis Hassabis
quotes.title: CEO, Google DeepMind; Nobel laureate in Chemistry 2024

quotes.quote: AI is the most profound technology humanity is working on, more profound than fire or electricity. In science it is already changing what is knowable.
quotes.speaker: Sundar Pichai
quotes.title: CEO, Google / Alphabet

quotes.quote: I can imagine a world where AI agents run thousands of experiments in parallel, and the human scientist's role becomes one of asking the right question and interpreting the result.
quotes.speaker: Fei-Fei Li
quotes.title: Co-Director, Stanford Institute for Human-Centered AI
quotes.source: The Worlds I See / public lectures
